title: lepidium kawarau
intro: Lepidium kawarau, also known as Kawarau pepperwort or Kawarau peppergrass, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in New Zealand for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Lepidium kawarau include its ability to aid in the digestion of food, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Lepidium kawarau can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used as a natural remedy in traditional medicine.
